result.summary: The page is mostly well-formed, but there is a clear spelling error in the navigation, game tiles in the right column are awkwardly clipped at the viewport edge, and one grid cell shows partial/missing jackpot label alignment. Overall 4 issues found: 1 major and 3 minor.

issues.description: The navigation tab is labeled 'Jacpots' instead of 'Jackpots' — a visible typo in a primary navigation element.
issues.suggestion: Correct the spelling to 'Jackpots' in the navigation label.

issues.description: Game tiles in the third column (e.g., 'Magni... Pho...', 'Munc... Mi...', 'Hyperc...') are cut off mid-tile at the right edge of the viewport, showing roughly half of each card.
issues.suggestion: If these are horizontal carousels, this may be intentional peek behavior, but consider adjusting tile sizing/padding so a more balanced portion of the next card is visible, or add a visible scroll affordance so users know more content exists.

issues.description: The 'Hot Games' navigation item is truncated to 'Hot Gam' at the right edge with no visible scroll indicator or fade to signal more tabs.
issues.suggestion: Add a gradient fade or scroll arrow on the nav bar edge to indicate horizontally scrollable navigation.

issues.description: The bottom row of the 'Top Played New Games' section is cut off vertically by the bottom navigation bar, showing only partial game tiles ('Millionaire', pig-themed game, 'Dark Waters').
issues.suggestion: Ensure adequate bottom padding on the scrollable content area so tiles are not permanently obscured by the fixed bottom navigation, and verify scrolling reveals the full row.
